codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature description and VAL-SESSION-002/003 by introducing explicit Mission protocol fields, preserving them across create/send/update/save/load flows, preventing downgrade from generic settings updates, and wiring kill_worker_session through the Electron/backend session stack with focused regression coverage.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared mission library/docs do not document the validated kill_worker_session workerSessionId contract, so the worker had to search external sources and probe behavior during implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The worker transcript skeleton for session 33e2c25c-2728-45e8-8946-d4a2af32cf49 includes WebSearch calls for Factory/GitHub docs plus repo doc greps with no local matches, while current shared library files still contain no kill_worker_session or workerSessionId notes.

summary: Pass: the feature preserves explicit Mission metadata across create/send/update/save/load flows, blocks downgrade from transient generic settings updates, and exposes kill_worker_session plumbing without a code defect found in review.
